levers.headline: You are not appearing in discovery yet
levers.detail: Discovery only shows professionals who can actually be booked, so this is the first thing to fix — until it is done, nothing else below can help.

actions.label: Add at least one active service offering.
Add or publish at least one bookable location.

levers.headline: Adding looks would widen your reach
levers.detail: Clients reach your work through the tags and services on your looks.

levers.headline: You have an opening in 2 days
levers.detail: Near-term availability is working in your favour with clients looking to book soon.

levers.headline: Not enough views to judge yet
levers.detail: Once your looks have been seen a bit more, this will show how often they turn into bookings.

notMeasured: How fast you reply to messages. The plan calls for it, but nothing measures it yet, so it does not affect where you appear.
Reviews and star ratings. They matter to clients deciding, but they are not an input to discovery ranking today.
